summary: First-finish testing for NewFriends SolarEnergy quotation app. Backend and frontend both verified end-to-end. All 6 backend endpoints and the primary frontend happy-path (form fill -> KW select -> amount OK with 8.9% GST split -> generate -> printable quotation -> history list -> delete) work correctly. Two minor test-script selector nits noted; no app bugs blocking first finish.
passed: POST /api/quotations with total 250000 & kw '5 KW' returns 200; basic_price=229568.41, gst_amount=20431.59, gst_rate=8.9, quote_no matches NFS/2026/0002 (year-scoped counter)
POST /api/quotations with total_amount=0 returns 400 with proper detail
GET /api/quotations list includes newly created quotation
DELETE /api/quotations/{id} returns success; subsequent GET returns 404
Home '/' loads with Customer Details, Service & Capacity, Amount & GST, Include Items sections and vendor card with phone 98724-07002
Filling name/phone/address and selecting KW '5 KW' works; kw_range is persisted correctly to backend as '5 KW'
Entering total 250000 and clicking OK updates Basic (₹2,29,568.41), GST (₹20,431.59), Total (₹2,50,000.00) breakdown cards and Live Summary side panel exactly
Presets popover opens showing common amounts (₹1L..₹7.5L visible)

Generate Quotation POSTs to backend and navigates to /quotation/{id}; page shows doc-quote-no=NFS/2026/0001, doc-basic ₹2,29,568.41, doc-gst ₹20,431.59, doc-total ₹2,50,000.00, customer name 'John Doe', Print and Download PDF buttons
History page '/history' lists the saved quotation with history-view-{id} and history-delete-{id}
Delete confirmation flow (confirm-delete-{id}) removes the row and shows 'Quotation deleted' toast

failed.issue: Locator for [data-testid='item-input-1'] / 'item-label-1' timed out after clicking include-items-toggle. Component IncludeItemsEditor.jsx does render these testids (verified in source). Likely test-script timing/toggle-state issue. Not blocking: KW auto-fill is proven working because generated quotation persisted kw_range='5 KW' and inverter item propagated to the DB payload as expected.
failed.evidence: Backend quotation created with kw_range '5 KW' and items array; frontend navigation to /quotation/{id} succeeded and showed correct values.

failed.issue: Preset option locator prefix used 'amount-preset-option-*' but actual testid is 'amount-preset-{amt}' (per AmountField.jsx). Presets popover is functional and visible.
failed.evidence: Screenshot showed Common Amounts popover with 8 preset rows rendered.

action_items: No blocking action items. Main agent may proceed to first finish. Optional: full testing agent can retest inverter auto-update via item-input-1 with expanded-state guarantee, and re-verify preset click updates amount input.
